service.description: Create authenticated session from username/password and issue the pilot persistent login cookie.

parameter.name: username
parameter.description: Account username used for pilot login.

parameter.name: password
parameter.description: Account password used for pilot login.

parameter.name: ok
parameter.description: True when the login attempt completed without facade errors.

parameter.name: messages
parameter.description: Informational messages emitted during login handling.

parameter.name: errors
parameter.description: Validation or authentication errors for the login attempt.

parameter.name: authenticated
parameter.description: True when the session is authenticated after the login attempt.

parameter.name: sessionInfo
parameter.description: Authenticated session metadata returned to darpan-ui.

service.description: Return session metadata for darpan-ui route guards, restoring the session from a persistent login cookie when possible.

parameter.name: ok
parameter.description: True when the session info lookup completed without facade errors.

parameter.name: messages
parameter.description: Informational messages emitted during session bootstrap.

parameter.name: errors
parameter.description: Errors returned while resolving session state.

parameter.name: authenticated
parameter.description: True when the current request resolves to an authenticated session.

parameter.name: sessionInfo
parameter.description: Authenticated session metadata returned to darpan-ui.

service.description: Clear the pilot persistent login cookie and terminate the current authenticated session when present.

parameter.name: ok
parameter.description: True when logout cleanup completed without facade errors.

parameter.name: messages
parameter.description: Informational messages emitted during logout handling.

parameter.name: errors
parameter.description: Errors returned while clearing session state.

parameter.name: authenticated
parameter.description: Always false after logout cleanup finishes.
